source_results.content:
VANSH BHARDWAJ
Delhi, IN | vansh.bhardwaj.ug23@nsut.ac.in | +91-9958413469
Leetcode | GitHub | LinkedIn | GeeksforGeeks
Data Science Intern - IndiGo									  June 2026 - Present
Developing a multi-class Machine Learning model to classify Mandatory Occurrence Reports (MORs) from incoming Flight Safety incident reports, improving incident triaging and regulatory compliance.
Developing scalable data pipelines and workflow automation solutions to transform unstructured aviation safety reports into structured insights while ensuring DGCA regulatory compliance.
ERiCA | (Python, LangGraph, win32com, Pandas, OpenPyXL, Pathlib,OS, Datetime/Time, TypedDict)
Designed and developed ERiCA, a LangGraph-powered autonomous AI agent for automated aviation safety report classification using ERCS, ARMS, and 5x5 risk assessment frameworks.
Built a modular LangGraph StateGraph workflow comprising queue management, intent classification, validation, and execution agents for reliable end-to-end processing.
Smart Traffic Light Control System | (Python, OpenCV, YOLOv8, NumPy, Pygame, Matplotlib, Pandas)
Developed a Computer Vision-based smart traffic management system using YOLOv8 and OpenCV to dynamically optimize traffic signal timing based on real-time vehicle density.
Implemented emergency vehicle prioritization (Green Corridor) logic to reduce emergency response delays and improve traffic efficiency by approximately 80%.
Amazon ML Summer School 2025  | Amazon India
Selected among top 3000 applicants out of 60k+ participants nationwide for an intensive, invite-only training program focused on advanced machine learning topics.
Google AI Essentials | Google
Completed Google's AI Essentials program covering Prompt Engineering, Generative AI, Responsible AI, LLM applications, and AI-assisted productivity workflows.
Languages : C++, Python, Java,  MySQL, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript
Developer Tools : Git/GitHub, VS Code, PyCharm, Figma, Canva, MATLAB
Relevant Coursework : OS, DBMS, Computer Networks, OOPs, DSA, Design & Analysis of Algorithms
President - Enactus NSUT
Leading Enactus NSUT, a 120-member organization, by overseeing strategic planning, project execution, stakeholder coordination, and representing the college at the Enactus India National Exposition 2024 and 2025.
Led Project Srijan by managing a cross-functional team of 20+ members, delivering 500+ customized calendars and executing multiple corporate orders while ensuring timely project delivery.
Director - Nalum (Alumni Society of NSUT)
Managing alumni database operations for 5000+ alumni while coordinating networking events through Nalum’s website.
Organized Alumni Meet-2025 & Silver Jubilee Function leading a team of 100+ volunteers.
Solved 350+ Data Structures & Algorithms problems across different coding platforms.
Secured Department Rank 1 in the 5th and 6th semesters with SGPAs of 9.33 and 9.17 respectively.
